title: aletes humilis
intro: Aletes humilis, also known as low false gleeke, is a perennial plant in the carrot family native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Aletes humilis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Aletes humilis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in the form of tinctures or ointments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
